overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a red jacket walking through Night City's neon-lit streets at night. The character traverses covered sidewalks, crosses plazas with massive digital billboards, walks through a covered corridor with animated floor advertisements, and navigates busy urban intersections with towering corporate buildings.

events.description: character steps onto striped crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath an elevated highway structure and crossing the street at a crosswalk

notable_agents.action: black car driving down the street past the crosswalk

entered.detail: massive elevated concrete highway structure spanning the width of the street
tall buildings covered with glowing neon advertisements and signage
wide paved road with yellow lane markings and vehicle traffic
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway structure, surrounded by towering buildings covered in neon advertisements. The character approaches and begins crossing a multi-lane street with sparse vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with digital billboards

events.description: exits covered sidewalk into wide open plaza with massive curved digital displays

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide pedestrian plaza with yellow striped crosswalk markings

notable_agents.action: woman in white jacket and dark pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: massive curved wall covered with multiple glowing digital advertisement screens
tall cylindrical structure with intense vertical red neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide pedestrian plaza dominated by a massive curved digital billboard wall on the right and a prominent red neon pillar. Pedestrians cross in various directions across the yellow-striped plaza floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with seating and vertical gardens

agents.ego_description: walking past bench seating areas along a landscaped wall with scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in dark shirt sitting on a bench facing the walkway

entered.detail: tall architectural wall covered with greenery and climbing plants
row of concrete benches with people sitting and resting

segments.scene_description: Walking along a quieter section of the plaza featuring a vertical garden wall with integrated bench seating. The area is less crowded with scattered pedestrians and some individuals resting on benches while approaching a staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway entrance with digital floor

events.description: character begins ascending wide concrete staircase into covered walkway
enters fully covered corridor with animated digital floor displays

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs and entering a covered walkway with glowing animated floor advertisements

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with yellow edge markings leading upward
illuminated floor panels displaying animated anime character advertisements in pink and purple
row of blue and white automated vending machines against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide staircase into a covered walkway featuring illuminated floor panels displaying vibrant anime-style advertisements. Blue vending machines line the right wall as the space becomes fully enclosed and artificially lit.

scene_state.functional_zone: long covered corridor with dynamic floor advertising

events.description: floor display changes from anime character to green burrito advertisement
floor display shifts to purple and pink anime character with text

agents.ego_description: walking through the long corridor observing the changing floor advertisements and neon ceiling

notable_agents.action: person in green jacket carrying a bag walking toward the camera

entered.detail: long enclosed passage with high ceilings and structural steel beams
overhead digital screens showing tropical palm tree imagery and abstract patterns
building facade with large green neon 'softsys' signage visible at corridor end

segments.scene_description: Walking through an extended covered corridor with dynamically changing floor advertisements cycling through various products and anime characters. The ceiling displays tropical imagery while the distant 'softsys' building marks the corridor's end.

events.description: exits covered corridor into open street with tall corporate buildings
character turns right at the street intersection

agents.ego_description: exiting the corridor and turning right at the street intersection near a food cart

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving along the street past the intersection

entered.detail: massive building with illuminated gold 'ARASAKA' signage on the facade
wide road crossing with traffic lights and pedestrian crosswalks
street vendor cart with glowing green light and umbrella

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered corridor into an open urban intersection dominated by the massive Arasaka building. The character turns right past a street food cart, transitioning from the enclosed neon corridor to the open city street with vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with elevated transit track

events.description: environment becomes significantly brighter with natural overcast lighting as character enters new district

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk toward a busy intersection with other pedestrians in a brighter, more open area

entered.detail: elevated transit track structure spanning across the street
cluster of high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and modern glass facades

segments.scene_description: Walking along a busy city sidewalk beneath an elevated monorail track in a brighter, overcast environment. Tall glass skyscrapers rise in the distance as the character approaches another intersection in the dense urban environment with moderate pedestrian traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched urban landscape that transitions from enclosed industrial corridors to an open, towering corporate district. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway and towering neon advertisements, moving across a multi-lane street into a wide pedestrian plaza dominated by a curved digital billboard and a red neon pillar. As the camera passes a quiet vertical garden and ascends a wide staircase, the environment shifts into a fully enclosed walkway featuring illuminated anime-style floor panels and blue vending machines. The scene then extends through a long corridor with cycling digital advertisements and tropical ceiling imagery before emerging into an open intersection beneath the massive Arasaka building. Finally, the camera turns past a street food cart and moves along a busy sidewalk under an elevated monorail track, where the lighting becomes brighter and overcast amidst a forest of glass skyscrapers.
